text.message: Best wood seems solid to hop on, just might be too slow to build to wheat
yeah that was my thought process

if i was guaranteed sheep port, yeah i absolutely take 3 4 8
I thought ted was taking it fs
but more likely blue wins that race and i end up portless
idk there were many options for me, all of them flawed in some way
Also that 6 wheat block does nothing to black, only hurts me lol
And your about to get army
not the greatest moment you could've picked to whine about a block black
are we playing the same game?
i didnt whine abt the block j said blue was ahead of me here
Don't think im the rob here red lol
hes playing with emotion u can tell
I mean grief last place, good luck
to call someone bud and then act this way

First to drp city, and ows
im on 3 numbers, have been plowed, and two players are on 4 points
And u hit 6 wheat everty8me when it does nothing against black, only hurts me
but you continue to hit me
happy to follow ur lead here

if you wanna try robbing other players, ill try placing it elsewhere
im just telling you how im gonna plauy

which is that i will follow your lead. you can complain but you wont change how i play

it's self preservation at this point
im happy to follow your lead and target blue. but you have been unwilling to do that
I didnt, I robbed u a couple times. Now im solely buying devs, taking youre army away and hitting u. Like I said, enjoy losing
I havent hit u in like 10 orbits
can we just reset and stop playing emotional;
you robbed me every single time and have continued to say that im winning
I havent even had the chance
i have repeatedly said i am willing to reset
But you've hit me 3 times in the last 5 orbits
DUDE just say you'll hit blue and I will FOLLOW your lead
No, you've thrown it already. You've ruined my game by hitting last place and blocking my 6
